{{Quote|Konkeel pie is highly toxic to humanoids. The Hewett senators apologized and removed it from their menu.|Adi Gallia|<ref name="E1A4" />}}
The '''Hewett''' were a non-[[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]], [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]] from the [[Hewett system/Legends|Hewett system]]. At one point, an official banquet was held for Hewett [[Senator/Legends|senators]], at which [[Konkeel pie]] was served on the menu. The [[Pie/Legends|pie]] was [[Poison/Legends|toxic]] to humanoids, and the [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]] almost ate some before [[Gender/Legends|his]] contemporary [[Adi Gallia/Legends|Adi Gallia]] stopped him.

==Biology and appearance==
The Hewett were a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]] of non-[[Humanoid/Legends|humanoids]]. Some elements of their [[Diet/Legends|diet]], such as [[Konkeel pie]], were highly [[Poison/Legends|toxic]] to humanoids, of which several were known to have [[Death/Legends|died]] after consuming it.<ref name="E1A4" />

==History==
{{Quote|Remember the official banquet for the Hewett senators? You stopped me before I took a bite of Konkeel pie.|Qui-Gon Jinn, to Adi Gallia|<ref name="E1A4" />}}
[[File:Hewett_space.jpg|thumb|right|The Hewett hailed from the Hewett system, in the Mid Rim.]]
The Hewett were native to the [[Hewett system/Legends|Hewett system]]<ref name="Planetnamia" /> in the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] [[Sector/Legends|sector]] of the [[Hewett sector/Legends|same name]].<ref name="TEAOC">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}}</ref> At one point, an official banquet was held for Hewett [[Senator/Legends|senators]], which the [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Masters]] [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]] and [[Adi Gallia/Legends|Adi Gallia]] attended. The menu included the dessert Konkeel [[Pie/Legends|pie]], and Jinn almost ate some of the food before Gallia stopped him, pointing out the dangers. The toxicity of the pie was brought to the attention of the Hewett senators, who then arranged for the item to be removed from the menu and apologized to the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]]. The next [[Standard year/Legends|year]], Jinn related the incident to his [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]], [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]], insisting that Gallia had saved his life.<ref name="E1A4" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Hewett were created by [[Ryder Windham]] and were mentioned in his adventure book ''[[Episode I Adventures 4: Jedi Emergency]]'', which was published by [[Scholastic]] in [[1999]].<ref name="E1A4" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Episode I Adventures 4: Jedi Emergency]]'' {{1stm}}
